nodes.summary: Add NFR-A11Y-001 to spec.md scaffold template
Add T-Axx accessibility task block to tasks.md scaffold template
Add Accessibility Gate section to hardening_review.md scaffold template
Add WCAG SC column to traceability.md scaffold template
Extend quality-spec-pr-ready to validate Accessibility Gate for applicable specs
Add touchpoints-test-a11y Make target and test_a11y.sh script
Add apps-a11y-smoke Make target and a11y_smoke.sh script
Add axe_page_scan.mjs Playwright+axe runner with explicit WCAG 2.1 AA tag array
Add axe_preset.ts exporting WCAG21AA_AXE_CONFIG and assertAxeWcag21AA
Extend test-smoke-all-local to include apps-a11y-smoke
Add docs/platform/accessibility/acr.md consumer-seeded VPAT 2.4 scaffold
Add quality-a11y-acr-check Make target and check_acr_freshness.py script
Add quality-a11y-acr-sync Make target and sync_acr_criteria.py script
Update PR Packager skill runbook with ACR review checklist item for UI-layer specs
Wire quality-a11y-acr-check into quality hooks chain
All a11y gates MUST target WCAG 2.1 AA with explicit wcag21a and wcag21aa axe tags
Zero impact on existing consumer specs and artifact files
ACR staleness window configurable; diagnostic output self-describing
All new Make targets and scripts testable without live browser
spec.md template contains NFR-A11Y-001
tasks.md template contains T-Axx block with wcag21aa and attachTo: document.body
hardening_review.md template contains Accessibility Gate section
traceability.md template header contains WCAG SC column
quality-spec-pr-ready validates Accessibility Gate unchecked boxes
touchpoints-test-a11y target resolves; test_a11y.sh exists
apps-a11y-smoke target resolves; test-smoke-all-local includes it
axe_page_scan.mjs contains wcag21a and wcag21aa in runOnly.values
axe_preset.ts exports WCAG21AA_AXE_CONFIG with correct tag array
acr.md scaffold exists with all WCAG 2.1 A+AA criterion rows
quality-a11y-acr-check exits 1 for missing/stale ACR; exits 0 for fresh ACR
PR Packager skill runbook contains ACR review checklist item for UI-layer specs
